revision.text:
{{Short description|Buddhist temple in Nankoku, Kochi, Japan}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Tosa Kokubun-ji | native_name = 土佐国分寺 | image = File:Tosa_Kokubunji_02.JPG | image_size = 300 | alt = | map_type = | map_size = | map_alt = | map_caption = | location = [[Kōchi Prefecture|Kōchi-ken]] | coordinates = {{coord|33.59869|133.64047|format=dms|type:landmark_region:JP|display=inline,title}} | religious_affiliation = [[Shingon]] | deity = | country = [[Japan]] | functional_status = | founded_by = | year_completed = | website = http://www.88shikokuhenro.jp/29kokubunji/ }} '''Tosa Kokubun-ji''' is a [[Shingon]] Buddhist Temple located in [[Nankoku, Kōchi]], [[Japan]]. It is the 29th temple of the [[Shikoku Pilgrimage]].<ref>{{Cite web|title=第29番札所 摩尼山 宝蔵院 国分寺 – （一社）四国八十八ヶ所霊場会|url=http://www.88shikokuhenro.jp/29kokubunji/|website=www.88shikokuhenro.jp|access-date=2020-05-26}}</ref><ref>{{Cite book|url=https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/76788376|title=Kōchi-ken no rekishi sanpo|date=2006|publisher=Yamakawa Shuppansha|others=Kōchi-ken Kōtō Gakkō Kyōiku Kenkyūkai. Rekishi Bukai., 高知県高等学校教育研究会. 歴史部会.|isbn=4-634-24639-2|edition=1-han|location=Tōkyō|oclc=76788376}}</ref> It is also the [[Tosa Province]] [[Sōja shrine]]
== See also ==
* [[Tosa jinja]] ([[Tosa Province]] [[Ichinomiya]])

revision.comment: pre-cache bump
revision.text:
{{Short description|Buddhist temple in Nankoku, Kochi, Japan}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Tosa Kokubun-ji | native_name = 土佐国分寺 | image = File:Tosa_Kokubunji_02.JPG | image_size = 300 | alt = | map_type = | map_size = | map_alt = | map_caption = | location = [[Kōchi Prefecture|Kōchi-ken]] | coordinates = {{coord|33.59869|133.64047|format=dms|type:landmark_region:JP|display=inline,title}} | religious_affiliation = [[Shingon]] | deity = | country = [[Japan]] | functional_status = | founded_by = | year_completed = | website = http://www.88shikokuhenro.jp/29kokubunji/ }} '''Tosa Kokubun-ji''' is a [[Shingon]] Buddhist Temple located in [[Nankoku, Kōchi]], [[Japan]]. It is the 29th temple of the [[Shikoku Pilgrimage]].<ref>{{Cite web|title=第29番札所 摩尼山 宝蔵院 国分寺 – （一社）四国八十八ヶ所霊場会|url=http://www.88shikokuhenro.jp/29kokubunji/|website=www.88shikokuhenro.jp|access-date=2020-05-26}}</ref><ref>{{Cite book|url=https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/76788376|title=Kōchi-ken no rekishi sanpo|date=2006|publisher=Yamakawa Shuppansha|others=Kōchi-ken Kōtō Gakkō Kyōiku Kenkyūkai. Rekishi Bukai., 高知県高等学校教育研究会. 歴史部会.|isbn=4-634-24639-2|edition=1-han|location=Tōkyō|oclc=76788376}}</ref> It is also the [[Tosa Province]] [[Sōja shrine]]
== See also ==
* [[Tosa jinja]] ([[Tosa Province]] [[Ichinomiya]])

{{Short description|Buddhist temple in Nankoku, Kochi, Japan}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Tosa Kokubun-ji | native_name = 土佐国分寺 | image = File:Tosa_Kokubunji_02.JPG | image_size = 300 | alt = | map_type = | map_size = | map_alt = | map_caption = | location = [[Kōchi Prefecture|Kōchi-ken]] | coordinates = {{coord|33.59869|133.64047|format=dms|type:landmark_region:JP|display=inline,title}} | religious_affiliation = [[Shingon]] | deity = | country = [[Japan]] | functional_status = | founded_by = | year_completed = | website = http://www.88shikokuhenro.jp/29kokubunji/ }} '''Tosa Kokubun-ji''' is a [[Shingon]] Buddhist Temple located in [[Nankoku, Kōchi]], [[Japan]]. It is the 29th temple of the [[Shikoku Pilgrimage]].<ref>{{Cite web|title=第29番札所 摩尼山 宝蔵院 国分寺 – （一社）四国八十八ヶ所霊場会|url=http://www.88shikokuhenro.jp/29kokubunji/|website=www.88shikokuhenro.jp|access-date=2020-05-26}}</ref><ref>{{Cite book|url=https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/76788376|title=Kōchi-ken no rekishi sanpo|date=2006|publisher=Yamakawa Shuppansha|others=Kōchi-ken Kōtō Gakkō Kyōiku Kenkyūkai. Rekishi Bukai., 高知県高等学校教育研究会. 歴史部会.|isbn=4-634-24639-2|edition=1-han|location=Tōkyō|oclc=76788376}}</ref> It is also the [[Tosa Province]] [[Sōja shrine]]
== See also ==
* [[Tosa jinja]] ([[Tosa Province]] [[Ichinomiya]])

revision.text:
{{Short description|Buddhist temple in Nankoku, Kochi, Japan}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Tosa Kokubun-ji | native_name = 土佐国分寺 | image = File:Tosa_Kokubunji_02.JPG | image_size = 300 | alt = | map_type = | map_size = | map_alt = | map_caption = | location = [[Kōchi Prefecture|Kōchi-ken]] | coordinates = {{coord|33.59869|133.64047|format=dms|type:landmark_region:JP|display=inline,title}} | religious_affiliation = [[Shingon]] | deity = | country = [[Japan]] | functional_status = | founded_by = | year_completed = | website = http://www.88shikokuhenro.jp/29kokubunji/ }} '''Tosa Kokubun-ji''' is a [[Shingon]] Buddhist Temple located in [[Nankoku, Kōchi]], [[Japan]]. It is the 29th temple of the [[Shikoku Pilgrimage]].<ref>{{Cite web|title=第29番札所 摩尼山 宝蔵院 国分寺 – （一社）四国八十八ヶ所霊場会|url=http://www.88shikokuhenro.jp/29kokubunji/|website=www.88shikokuhenro.jp|access-date=2020-05-26}}</ref><ref>{{Cite book|url=https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/76788376|title=Kōchi-ken no rekishi sanpo|date=2006|publisher=Yamakawa Shuppansha|others=Kōchi-ken Kōtō Gakkō Kyōiku Kenkyūkai. Rekishi Bukai., 高知県高等学校教育研究会. 歴史部会.|isbn=4-634-24639-2|edition=1-han|location=Tōkyō|oclc=76788376}}</ref> It is also the [[Tosa Province]] [[Sōja shrine]]
== See also ==
* [[Tosa jinja]] ([[Tosa Province]] [[Ichinomiya]])

{{Short description|Buddhist temple in Nankoku, Kochi, Japan}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Tosa Kokubun-ji | native_name = 土佐国分寺 | image = File:Tosa_Kokubunji_02.JPG | image_size = 300 | alt = | map_type = | map_size = | map_alt = | map_caption = | location = [[Kōchi Prefecture|Kōchi-ken]] | coordinates = {{coord|33.59869|133.64047|format=dms|type:landmark_region:JP|display=inline,title}} | religious_affiliation = [[Shingon]] | deity = | country = [[Japan]] | functional_status = | founded_by = | year_completed = | website = http://www.88shikokuhenro.jp/29kokubunji/ }} '''Tosa Kokubun-ji''' is a [[Shingon]] Buddhist Temple located in [[Nankoku, Kōchi]], [[Japan]]. It is the 29th temple of the [[Shikoku Pilgrimage]].<ref>{{Cite web|title=第29番札所 摩尼山 宝蔵院 国分寺 – （一社）四国八十八ヶ所霊場会|url=http://www.88shikokuhenro.jp/29kokubunji/|website=www.88shikokuhenro.jp|access-date=2020-05-26}}</ref><ref>{{Cite book|url=https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/76788376|title=Kōchi-ken no rekishi sanpo|date=2006|publisher=Yamakawa Shuppansha|others=Kōchi-ken Kōtō Gakkō Kyōiku Kenkyūkai. Rekishi Bukai., 高知県高等学校教育研究会. 歴史部会.|isbn=4-634-24639-2|edition=1-han|location=Tōkyō|oclc=76788376}}</ref> It is also the [[Tosa Province]] [[Sōja shrine]]

revision.text:
{{Short description|Buddhist temple in Nankoku, Kochi, Japan}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Tosa Kokubun-ji | native_name = 土佐国分寺 | image = File:Tosa_Kokubunji_02.JPG | image_size = 300 | alt = | map_type = | map_size = | map_alt = | map_caption = | location = [[Kōchi Prefecture|Kōchi-ken]] | coordinates = {{coord|33.59869|133.64047|format=dms|type:landmark_region:JP|display=inline,title}} | religious_affiliation = [[Shingon]] | deity = | country = [[Japan]] | functional_status = | founded_by = | year_completed = | website = http://www.88shikokuhenro.jp/29kokubunji/ }} '''Tosa Kokubun-ji''' is a [[Shingon]] Buddhist Temple located in [[Nankoku, Kōchi]], [[Japan]]. It is the 29th temple of the [[Shikoku Pilgrimage]].<ref>{{Cite web|title=第29番札所 摩尼山 宝蔵院 国分寺 – （一社）四国八十八ヶ所霊場会|url=http://www.88shikokuhenro.jp/29kokubunji/|website=www.88shikokuhenro.jp|access-date=2020-05-26}}</ref><ref>{{Cite book|url=https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/76788376|title=Kōchi-ken no rekishi sanpo|date=2006|publisher=Yamakawa Shuppansha|others=Kōchi-ken Kōtō Gakkō Kyōiku Kenkyūkai. Rekishi Bukai., 高知県高等学校教育研究会. 歴史部会.|isbn=4-634-24639-2|edition=1-han|location=Tōkyō|oclc=76788376}}</ref> It is also the [[Tosa Province]] [[Sōja shrine]]
== See also ==
* [[Tosa jinja]] ([[Tosa Province]] [[Ichinomiya]])
== References == {{Reflist}}

revision.comment: Adding [[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]][[Category:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]][[Category:second attempt at refreshing on January 27 2024]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{Short description|Buddhist temple in Nankoku, Kochi, Japan}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Tosa Kokubun-ji | native_name = 土佐国分寺 | image = File:Tosa_Kokubunji_02.JPG | image_size = 300 | alt = | map_type = | map_size = | map_alt = | map_caption = | location = [[Kōchi Prefecture|Kōchi-ken]] | coordinates = {{coord|33.59869|133.64047|format=dms|type:landmark_region:JP|display=inline,title}} | religious_affiliation = [[Shingon]] | deity = | country = [[Japan]] | functional_status = | founded_by = | year_completed = | website = http://www.88shikokuhenro.jp/29kokubunji/ }} '''Tosa Kokubun-ji''' is a [[Shingon]] Buddhist Temple located in [[Nankoku, Kōchi]], [[Japan]]. It is the 29th temple of the [[Shikoku Pilgrimage]].<ref>{{Cite web|title=第29番札所 摩尼山 宝蔵院 国分寺 – （一社）四国八十八ヶ所霊場会|url=http://www.88shikokuhenro.jp/29kokubunji/|website=www.88shikokuhenro.jp|access-date=2020-05-26}}</ref><ref>{{Cite book|url=https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/76788376|title=Kōchi-ken no rekishi sanpo|date=2006|publisher=Yamakawa Shuppansha|others=Kōchi-ken Kōtō Gakkō Kyōiku Kenkyūkai. Rekishi Bukai., 高知県高等学校教育研究会. 歴史部会.|isbn=4-634-24639-2|edition=1-han|location=Tōkyō|oclc=76788376}}</ref> It is also the [[Tosa Province]] [[Sōja shrine]]
== See also ==
* [[Tosa jinja]] ([[Tosa Province]] [[Ichinomiya]])
== References == {{Reflist}}

{{Short description|Buddhist temple in Nankoku, Kochi, Japan}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Tosa Kokubun-ji | native_name = 土佐国分寺 | image = File:Tosa_Kokubunji_02.JPG | image_size = 300 | alt = | map_type = | map_size = | map_alt = | map_caption = | location = [[Kōchi Prefecture|Kōchi-ken]] | coordinates = {{coord|33.59869|133.64047|format=dms|type:landmark_region:JP|display=inline,title}} | religious_affiliation = [[Shingon]] | deity = | country = [[Japan]] | functional_status = | founded_by = | year_completed = | website = http://www.88shikokuhenro.jp/29kokubunji/ }} '''Tosa Kokubun-ji''' is a [[Shingon]] Buddhist Temple located in [[Nankoku, Kōchi]], [[Japan]]. It is the 29th temple of the [[Shikoku Pilgrimage]].<ref>{{Cite web|title=第29番札所 摩尼山 宝蔵院 国分寺 – （一社）四国八十八ヶ所霊場会|url=http://www.88shikokuhenro.jp/29kokubunji/|website=www.88shikokuhenro.jp|access-date=2020-05-26}}</ref><ref>{{Cite book|url=https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/76788376|title=Kōchi-ken no rekishi sanpo|date=2006|publisher=Yamakawa Shuppansha|others=Kōchi-ken Kōtō Gakkō Kyōiku Kenkyūkai. Rekishi Bukai., 高知県高等学校教育研究会. 歴史部会.|isbn=4-634-24639-2|edition=1-han|location=Tōkyō|oclc=76788376}}</ref> It is also the [[Tosa Province]] [[Sōja shrine]]
== See also ==
* [[Tosa jinja]] ([[Tosa Province]] [[Ichinomiya]])

{{Short description|Buddhist temple in Nankoku, Kochi, Japan}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Tosa Kokubun-ji | native_name = 土佐国分寺 | image = File:Tosa_Kokubunji_02.JPG | image_size = 300 | alt = | map_type = | map_size = | map_alt = | map_caption = | location = [[Kōchi Prefecture|Kōchi-ken]] | coordinates = {{coord|33.59869|133.64047|format=dms|type:landmark_region:JP|display=inline,title}} | religious_affiliation = [[Shingon]] | deity = | country = [[Japan]] | functional_status = | founded_by = | year_completed = | website = http://www.88shikokuhenro.jp/29kokubunji/ }} '''Tosa Kokubun-ji''' is a [[Shingon]] Buddhist Temple located in [[Nankoku, Kōchi]], [[Japan]]. It is the 29th temple of the [[Shikoku Pilgrimage]].<ref>{{Cite web|title=第29番札所 摩尼山 宝蔵院 国分寺 – （一社）四国八十八ヶ所霊場会|url=http://www.88shikokuhenro.jp/29kokubunji/|website=www.88shikokuhenro.jp|access-date=2020-05-26}}</ref><ref>{{Cite book|url=https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/76788376|title=Kōchi-ken no rekishi sanpo|date=2006|publisher=Yamakawa Shuppansha|others=Kōchi-ken Kōtō Gakkō Kyōiku Kenkyūkai. revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[arz:توساكوكوبون جى]][[commons:Category:Tosa Kokubun-ji]][[de:Tosa Kokubun-ji]][[en:Tosa Kokubun-ji]][[fr:Tosa Kokubun-ji]][[ja:土佐国分寺]][[zh:土佐國分寺]] {{Infobox Buddhist temple|image=File:Tosa Kokubunji 02.JPG|prefecture={{ill|Nankoku|qid=Q861621}}|coordinates={{Coord|33.598694444444|N|133.64041666667|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}|part_of={{ill|Shikoku Pilgrimage|qid=Q1972399}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q10927608]] Wikidata name: Tosakokubun-ji [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Short description|Buddhist temple in Nankoku, Kochi, Japan}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Tosa Kokubun-ji | native_name = 土佐国分寺 | image = File:Tosa_Kokubunji_02.JPG | image_size = 300 | alt = | map_type = | map_size = | map_alt = | map_caption = | location = [[:en:Kōchi Prefecture|Kōchi-ken]] | coordinates = {{coord|33.59869|133.64047|format=dms|type:landmark_region:JP|display=inline,title}} | religious_affiliation = [[Shingon]] | deity = | country = [[:en:Japan|Japan]] | functional_status = | founded_by = | year_completed = | website = http://www.88shikokuhenro.jp/29kokubunji/ }} '''Tosa Kokubun-ji''' is a [[Shingon]] Buddhist Temple located in [[:en:Nankoku, Kōchi|Nankoku, Kōchi]], [[:en:Japan|Japan]]. It is the 29th temple of the [[:en:Shikoku Pilgrimage|Shikoku Pilgrimage]].<ref>{{Cite web|title=第29番札所 摩尼山 宝蔵院 国分寺 – （一社）四国八十八ヶ所霊場会|url=http://www.88shikokuhenro.jp/29kokubunji/|website=www.88shikokuhenro.jp|access-date=2020-05-26}}</ref><ref>{{Cite book|url=https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/76788376|title=Kōchi-ken no rekishi sanpo|date=2006|publisher=Yamakawa Shuppansha|others=Kōchi-ken Kōtō Gakkō Kyōiku Kenkyūkai. Rekishi Bukai., 高知県高等学校教育研究会. 歴史部会.|isbn=4-634-24639-2|edition=1-han|location=Tōkyō|oclc=76788376}}</ref> It is also the [[:en:Tosa Province|Tosa Province]] [[Sōja shrine]]
== See also ==
* [[Tosa Shrine|Tosa jinja]] ([[:en:Tosa Province|Tosa Province]] [[Ichinomiya]])
== References == {{Reflist}} ]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[arz:توساكوكوبون جى]][[sn:commons:Category:Tosa Kokubun-ji]][[de:Tosa Kokubun-ji]][[en:Tosa Kokubun-ji]][[fr:Tosa Kokubun-ji]][[ja:土佐国分寺]][[zh:土佐國分寺]] {{Infobox Buddhist temple|image=File:Tosa Kokubunji 02.JPG|prefecture={{ill|Nankoku|WD=Q861621}}|coordinates={{Coord|33.598694444444|N|133.64041666667|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}|part_of={{ill|Shikoku Pilgrimage|WD=Q1972399}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q10927608]] Wikidata name: Tosakokubun-ji [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Short description|Buddhist temple in Nankoku, Kochi, Japan}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Tosa Kokubun-ji | native_name = 土佐国分寺 | image = File:Tosa_Kokubunji_02.JPG | image_size = 300 | alt = | map_type = | map_size = | map_alt = | map_caption = | location = [[:en:Kōchi Prefecture|Kōchi-ken]] | coordinates = {{coord|33.59869|133.64047|format=dms|type:landmark_region:JP|display=inline,title}} | religious_affiliation = [[Shingon]] | deity = | country = [[:en:Japan|Japan]] | functional_status = | founded_by = | year_completed = | website = http://www.88shikokuhenro.jp/29kokubunji/ }} '''Tosa Kokubun-ji''' is a [[Shingon]] Buddhist Temple located in [[:en:Nankoku, Kōchi|Nankoku, Kōchi]], [[:en:Japan|Japan]]. It is the 29th temple of the [[:en:Shikoku Pilgrimage|Shikoku Pilgrimage]].<ref>{{Cite web|title=第29番札所 摩尼山 宝蔵院 国分寺 – （一社）四国八十八ヶ所霊場会|url=http://www.88shikokuhenro.jp/29kokubunji/|website=www.88shikokuhenro.jp|access-date=2020-05-26}}</ref><ref>{{Cite book|url=https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/76788376|title=Kōchi-ken no rekishi sanpo|date=2006|publisher=Yamakawa Shuppansha|others=Kōchi-ken Kōtō Gakkō Kyōiku Kenkyūkai. Rekishi Bukai., 高知県高等学校教育研究会. 歴史部会.|isbn=4-634-24639-2|edition=1-han|location=Tōkyō|oclc=76788376}}</ref> It is also the [[:en:Tosa Province|Tosa Province]] [[Sōja shrine]]
== See also ==

revision.comment: Consolidate multiple wikidata link templates into single one at end
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[arz:توساكوكوبون جى]][[sn:commons:Category:Tosa Kokubun-ji]][[de:Tosa Kokubun-ji]][[en:Tosa Kokubun-ji]][[fr:Tosa Kokubun-ji]][[ja:土佐国分寺]][[zh:土佐國分寺]] {{Infobox Buddhist temple|image=File:Tosa Kokubunji 02.JPG|prefecture={{ill|Nankoku|WD=Q861621}}|coordinates={{Coord|33.598694444444|N|133.64041666667|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}|part_of={{ill|Shikoku Pilgrimage|WD=Q1972399}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q10927608]] Wikidata name: Tosakokubun-ji [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Short description|Buddhist temple in Nankoku, Kochi, Japan}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Tosa Kokubun-ji | native_name = 土佐国分寺 | image = File:Tosa_Kokubunji_02.JPG | image_size = 300 | alt = | map_type = | map_size = | map_alt = | map_caption = | location = [[:en:Kōchi Prefecture|Kōchi-ken]] | coordinates = {{coord|33.59869|133.64047|format=dms|type:landmark_region:JP|display=inline,title}} | religious_affiliation = [[Shingon]] | deity = | country = [[:en:Japan|Japan]] | functional_status = | founded_by = | year_completed = | website = http://www.88shikokuhenro.jp/29kokubunji/ }} '''Tosa Kokubun-ji''' is a [[Shingon]] Buddhist Temple located in [[:en:Nankoku, Kōchi|Nankoku, Kōchi]], [[:en:Japan|Japan]]. It is the 29th temple of the [[:en:Shikoku Pilgrimage|Shikoku Pilgrimage]].<ref>{{Cite web|title=第29番札所 摩尼山 宝蔵院 国分寺 – （一社）四国八十八ヶ所霊場会|url=http://www.88shikokuhenro.jp/29kokubunji/|website=www.88shikokuhenro.jp|access-date=2020-05-26}}</ref><ref>{{Cite book|url=https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/76788376|title=Kōchi-ken no rekishi sanpo|date=2006|publisher=Yamakawa Shuppansha|others=Kōchi-ken Kōtō Gakkō Kyōiku Kenkyūkai. Rekishi Bukai., 高知県高等学校教育研究会. 歴史部会.|isbn=4-634-24639-2|edition=1-han|location=Tōkyō|oclc=76788376}}</ref> It is also the [[:en:Tosa Province|Tosa Province]] [[Sōja shrine]]
== See also ==
* [[Tosa Shrine|Tosa jinja]] ([[:en:Tosa Province|Tosa Province]] [[Ichinomiya]])
== References == {{Reflist}} ]]

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[arz:توساكوكوبون جى]][[commons:Category:Tosa Kokubun-ji]][[de:Tosa Kokubun-ji]][[en:Tosa Kokubun-ji]][[fr:Tosa Kokubun-ji]][[ja:土佐国分寺]][[zh:土佐國分寺]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[arz:توساكوكوبون جى]][[commons:Category:Tosa Kokubun-ji]][[de:Tosa Kokubun-ji]][[en:Tosa Kokubun-ji]][[fr:Tosa Kokubun-ji]][[ja:土佐国分寺]][[zh:土佐國分寺]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[arz:توساكوكوبون جى]][[sn:commons:Category:Tosa Kokubun-ji]][[de:Tosa Kokubun-ji]][[en:Tosa Kokubun-ji]][[fr:Tosa Kokubun-ji]][[ja:土佐国分寺]][[zh:土佐國分寺]] {{Infobox Buddhist temple|image=File:Tosa Kokubunji 02.JPG|prefecture={{ill|Nankoku|WD=Q861621}}|coordinates={{Coord|33.598694444444|N|133.64041666667|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}|part_of={{ill|Shikoku Pilgrimage|WD=Q1972399}}}}{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q10927608]] Wikidata name: Tosakokubun-ji [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:01, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Short description|Buddhist temple in Nankoku, Kochi, Japan}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Tosa Kokubun-ji | native_name = 土佐国分寺 | image = File:Tosa_Kokubunji_02.JPG | image_size = 300 | alt = | map_type = | map_size = | map_alt = | map_caption = | location = [[:en:Kōchi Prefecture|Kōchi-ken]] | coordinates = {{coord|33.59869|133.64047|format=dms|type:landmark_region:JP|display=inline,title}} | religious_affiliation = [[Shingon]] | deity = | country = [[:en:Japan|Japan]] | functional_status = | founded_by = | year_completed = | website = http://www.88shikokuhenro.jp/29kokubunji/ }} '''Tosa Kokubun-ji''' is a [[Shingon]] Buddhist Temple located in [[:en:Nankoku, Kōchi|Nankoku, Kōchi]], [[:en:Japan|Japan]]. It is the 29th temple of the [[:en:Shikoku Pilgrimage|Shikoku Pilgrimage]].<ref>{{Cite web|title=第29番札所 摩尼山 宝蔵院 国分寺 – （一社）四国八十八ヶ所霊場会|url=http://www.88shikokuhenro.jp/29kokubunji/|website=www.88shikokuhenro.jp|access-date=2020-05-26}}</ref><ref>{{Cite book|url=https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/76788376|title=Kōchi-ken no rekishi sanpo|date=2006|publisher=Yamakawa Shuppansha|others=Kōchi-ken Kōtō Gakkō Kyōiku Kenkyūkai. Rekishi Bukai., 高知県高等学校教育研究会. 歴史部会.|isbn=4-634-24639-2|edition=1-han|location=Tōkyō|oclc=76788376}}</ref> It is also the [[:en:Tosa Province|Tosa Province]] [[Sōja shrine]]
== See also ==
* [[Tosa Shrine|Tosa jinja]] ([[:en:Tosa Province|Tosa Province]] [[Ichinomiya]])
== References == {{Reflist}} ]]

It is the 29th temple of the [[:en:Shikoku Pilgrimage|Shikoku Pilgrimage]].<ref>{{Cite web|title=第29番札所 摩尼山 宝蔵院 国分寺 – （一社）四国八十八ヶ所霊場会|url=http://www.88shikokuhenro.jp/29kokubunji/|website=www.88shikokuhenro.jp|access-date=2020-05-26}}</ref><ref>{{Cite book|url=https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/76788376|title=Kōchi-ken no rekishi sanpo|date=2006|publisher=Yamakawa Shuppansha|others=Kōchi-ken Kōtō Gakkō Kyōiku Kenkyūkai. Rekishi Bukai., 高知県高等学校教育研究会. 歴史部会.|isbn=4-634-24639-2|edition=1-han|location=Tōkyō|oclc=76788376}}</ref> It is also the [[:en:Tosa Province|Tosa Province]] [[Sōja shrine]]
== See also ==

It is the 29th temple of the {{ill|Shikoku Pilgrimage|en|Shikoku Pilgrimage|WD=Q1972399|lt=Shikoku Pilgrimage}}.<ref>{{Cite web|title=第29番札所 摩尼山 宝蔵院 国分寺 – （一社）四国八十八ヶ所霊場会|url=http://www.88shikokuhenro.jp/29kokubunji/|website=www.88shikokuhenro.jp|access-date=2020-05-26}}</ref><ref>{{Cite book|url=https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/76788376|title=Kōchi-ken no rekishi sanpo|date=2006|publisher=Yamakawa Shuppansha|others=Kōchi-ken Kōtō Gakkō Kyōiku Kenkyūkai. It is the 29th temple of the {{ill|Shikoku Pilgrimage|en|Shikoku Pilgrimage|WD=Q1972399|lt=Shikoku Pilgrimage|1=Shikoku Pilgrimage}}.<ref>{{Cite web|title=第29番札所 摩尼山 宝蔵院 国分寺 – （一社）四国八十八ヶ所霊場会|url=http://www.88shikokuhenro.jp/29kokubunji/|website=www.88shikokuhenro.jp|access-date=2020-05-26}}</ref><ref>{{Cite book|url=https://www.worldcat.org/oclc/76788376|title=Kōchi-ken no rekishi sanpo|date=2006|publisher=Yamakawa Shuppansha|others=Kōchi-ken Kōtō Gakkō Kyōiku Kenkyūkai. Rekishi Bukai., 高知県高等学校教育研究会. 歴史部会.|isbn=4-634-24639-2|edition=1-han|location=Tōkyō|oclc=76788376}}</ref> It is also the {{ill|Tosa Province|en|Tosa Province|WD=Q857330|lt=Tosa Province|1=Tosa Province}} [[Sōja shrine]]
== See also ==
* [[Tosa Shrine|Tosa jinja]] ({{ill|Tosa Province|en|Tosa Province|WD=Q857330|lt=Tosa Province|1=Tosa Province}} [[Ichinomiya]])
